core_principles: Clarity is Power: Data density without clutter.
Slate & Structure: Use cool neutrals to make data pop.
Action-First: The form and table are the heroes.
Modernist Grid: Rigid alignment, subtle borders.
design_philosophy.archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Modified for Slate Blue)

sidebar.behavior: sticky h-screen top-0 overflow-y-auto border-r border-slate-200 bg-white

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium text-sm transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium text-sm
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm
buttons.destructive: bg-white text-red-600 border border-red-200 hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium text-sm

inputs.style: bg-white border border-slate-300 text-slate-900 text-sm rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 block w-full p-2.5 shadow-sm transition-all
inputs.label: block mb-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700

tables.header: text-xs text-slate-500 uppercase bg-slate-50 border-b border-slate-200 py-3 px-4 font-semibold tracking-wider

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text is slate-600 or darker on white backgrounds.

login_page.left_panel: bg-slate-900 text-white flex flex-col justify-between p-12 relative overflow-hidden
login_page.visuals: Add a subtle abstract geometric pattern (CSS only) to the left panel.

dashboard_page.sidebar: w-80 border-r border-slate-200 bg-white flex-shrink-0 flex flex-col overflow-y-auto p-6
dashboard_page.header: h-16 border-b border-slate-200 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-between px-8 sticky top-0 z-10

universal_guidelines: Avoid gradients for main backgrounds; use them only for subtle accent borders or active states.
Use 'Slate' colors (slate-50 to slate-900) for all neutrals. Do not use pure gray.
Form inputs in the sidebar must be compact (py-2) to fit more content.
The data table must handle overflow horizontally with a scrollbar if needed.
Use Shadcn UI components but override the radius to 'rounded-md' for a sharper look.
